title: 人择CEO只直接管理一个人
description: 【简介】Anthropic的执行团队由其妹妹Daniela领导，负责日常运营并向董事会汇报，而Dario则专注于长期战略和研究方向。
titleZh: 人择CEO只直接管理一个人
titleEn: Anthropic CEO directly manages only one person
descriptionZh: 【简介】Anthropic的执行团队由其妹妹Daniela领导，负责日常运营并向董事会汇报，而Dario则专注于长期战略和研究方向。
descriptionEn: [Introduction] Anthropic's executive team is led by his sister Daniela, who handles daily operations and reports to the board, while Dario focuses on long-term strategy and research direction. He and his sister regard maintaining the company culture as the most important task. And he concentrates on what he truly needs to think about: Will AI ultimately turn humans into tools?

descriptionZh: 新增双盲同行评审机制
descriptionEn: New double-blind peer review mechanism added

title: OpenAI的“推理教父”投下重磅炸弹：真正的全能版AI——你看不起
description: 【引言】OpenAI o1 推理模型核心创建者 Noam Brown 发表了对整个行业的长篇批评：使用单一基准分数来评估 AI 模型从 2024 年开始就已经过时了。GPT-5.5 看起来只比 GPT-5.4 稍微好一点？
titleZh: OpenAI的“推理教父”投下重磅炸弹：真正的全能版AI——你看不起
titleEn: OpenAI's "Godfather of Reasoning" drops a bombshell: The true full-power version of AI—you can't afford to see it
descriptionZh: 【引言】OpenAI o1 推理模型核心创建者 Noam Brown 发表了对整个行业的长篇批评：使用单一基准分数来评估 AI 模型从 2024 年开始就已经过时了。GPT-5.5 看起来只比 GPT-5.4 稍微好一点？
descriptionEn: [Introduction] Noam Brown, the core creator of OpenAI's o1 reasoning model, published a lengthy critique of the entire industry: Using a single benchmark score to evaluate AI models has been outdated since 2024. GPT-5.5 only looks slightly better than GPT-5.4? Control the reasoning budget and take another look—it's a world of difference.

descriptionEn: The first pot of gold in AI interaction isn't in film or games—it's in advertising?

title: Anthropic CEO发表长篇宣言：指数级人工智能不可逆转，必须禁止不安全系统
description: [Overview] Just now, Anthropic’s CEO released a重磅 manifesto titled "Exponential AI Policy": the "exponential explosion" of AI is unstoppable, and mandatory third-party testing plus government intervention is necessary! To this end, Anthropic has invested $350 million in real money.
titleZh: Anthropic CEO发表长篇宣言：指数级人工智能不可逆转，必须禁止不安全系统
titleEn: Anthropic CEO publishes a lengthy manifesto: exponential AI is irreversible, and unsafe systems must be banned
descriptionZh: [Overview] Just now, Anthropic’s CEO released a重磅 manifesto titled "Exponential AI Policy": the "exponential explosion" of AI is unstoppable, and mandatory third-party testing plus government intervention is necessary! To this end, Anthropic has invested $350 million in real money.
descriptionEn: [Overview] Just now, Anthropic’s CEO released a blockbuster manifesto titled “Exponential AI Policy”: the “exponential explosion” of AI is unstoppable, and mandatory third-party testing plus government intervention is necessary! To this end, Anthropic has invested $350 million in real money.

title: 如果出生在中国，克劳德的身价是多少？
description: 中国大型机型的制约往往归结于供给端：算力是否充足、芯片是否受到限制。
titleZh: 如果出生在中国，克劳德的身价是多少？
titleEn: If born in China, how much would Claude be worth?
descriptionZh: 中国大型机型的制约往往归结于供给端：算力是否充足、芯片是否受到限制。
descriptionEn: The constraints on Chinese large models are often attributed to the supply side: whether computing power is sufficient, whether chips are restricted. But the demand side is severely underestimated today: whether users are willing and able to pay for it. This side may be a deeper hurdle.

title: ChatGPT突然焕然一新，奥特曼：不急于IPO
description: [概述] GPT-5.6 将于本月上市，据报道代理编码超越了 Anthropic 的 Mythos。
titleZh: ChatGPT突然焕然一新，奥特曼：不急于IPO
titleEn: ChatGPT Suddenly Revamps, Altman: No Rush for IPO
descriptionZh: [概述] GPT-5.6 将于本月上市，据报道代理编码超越了 Anthropic 的 Mythos。
descriptionEn: [Overview] GPT-5.6 is set to hit the table this month, with agentic coding reportedly surpassing Anthropic’s Mythos. Three flagship models are converging in the same June window, while two AI giants race toward IPOs. Yet Altman has thrown a bigger variable internally: if AI learns to improve itself first, there’s no rush to go public.
